'''âs-ng-n''' ('''kasangan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tint|tint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tint|tint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasangan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisangan|thisangan]] || [[word:jisangan|jisangan]] || [[word:shisangan|shisangan]] || [[word:kisangan|kisangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusangan|thuthusangan]] || [[word:jujusangan|jujusangan]] || [[word:shushusangan|shushusangan]] || [[word:kukusangan|kukusangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusangan|thusangan]] || [[word:jusangan|jusangan]] || [[word:shusangan|shusangan]] || [[word:kusangan|kusangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusangan|thusangan]] || [[word:jusangan|jusangan]] || [[word:shusangan|shusangan]] || [[word:kusangan|kusangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesangan|thesangan]] || [[word:jesangan|jesangan]] || [[word:shesangan|shesangan]] || [[word:kesangan|kesangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosangan|thothosangan]] || [[word:jojosangan|jojosangan]] || [[word:shoshosangan|shoshosangan]] || [[word:kokosangan|kokosangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosangan|thosangan]] || [[word:josangan|josangan]] || [[word:shosangan|shosangan]] || [[word:kosangan|kosangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosangan|thosangan]] || [[word:josangan|josangan]] || [[word:shosangan|shosangan]] || [[word:kosangan|kosangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsangan|thĂŠsangan]] || [[word:jĂŠsangan|jĂŠsangan]] || [[word:shĂŠsangan|shĂŠsangan]] || [[word:kĂŠsangan|kĂŠsangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasangan|thathasangan]] || [[word:jajasangan|jajasangan]] || [[word:shashasangan|shashasangan]] || [[word:kakasangan|kakasangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasangan|thasangan]] || [[word:jasangan|jasangan]] || [[word:shasangan|shasangan]] || [[word:kasangan|kasangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasangan|thasangan]] || [[word:jasangan|jasangan]] || [[word:shasangan|shasangan]] || [[word:kasangan|kasangan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasangan|shasangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasangan|goshasangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasangan|gokishasangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasanganĂŒ|shasanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasanganknĂŒ|goshasanganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanganĂŒ|gokishasanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasanganshĂ«|shasanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasangankshĂ«|goshasangankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasanganshĂ«|gokishasanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanganro|shasanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangankro|goshasangankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanganro|gokishasanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanganmu|shasanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangankmu|goshasangankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanganmu|gokishasanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasangansher|shasangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasanganksher|goshasanganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasangansher|gokishasangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasangang|shasangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasangankng|goshasangankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasangang|gokishasangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasanganya|shasanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasangankya|goshasangankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasanganya|gokishasanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasanganyam|shasanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasangankyam|goshasangankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasanganyam|gokishasanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasanganĂŒshĂ«|shasanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasanganknĂŒshĂ«|goshasanganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasanganĂŒshĂ«|gokishasanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanganĂŒro|shasanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasanganknĂŒro|goshasanganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanganĂŒro|gokishasanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanganĂŒmu|shasanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasanganknĂŒmu|goshasanganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanganĂŒmu|gokishasanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasanganshĂ«nĂŒ|shasanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasangankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanganshĂ«ro|shasanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangankshĂ«ro|goshasangankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanganshĂ«ro|gokishasanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanganshĂ«mu|shasanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangankshĂ«mu|goshasangankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanganshĂ«mu|gokishasanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasanganronĂŒ|shasanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangankronĂŒ|goshasangankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanganronĂŒ|gokishasanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasanganroshĂ«|shasanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangankroshĂ«|goshasangankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasanganroshĂ«|gokishasanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasanganromu|shasanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasangankromu|goshasangankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasanganromu|gokishasanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasanganmunĂŒ|shasanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasangankmunĂŒ|goshasangankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasanganmunĂŒ|gokishasanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasanganmushĂ«|shasanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasangankmushĂ«|goshasangankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasanganmushĂ«|gokishasanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasanganmuro|shasanganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasangankmuro|goshasangankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasanganmuro|gokishasanganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
